title: Profile

header.title: My Profile
header.description: Manage your profile and personal settings.

noProfile: Select or create a profile to get started

toast.profileSavedWithSync: Profile saved! Today's goals have been updated automatically.
toast.profileSavedSyncFailed: Note: Could not update today's goals. Try syncing manually.
toast.incompleteBasicInfo: Please fill in all basic information before saving
toast.incompleteBasicInfoDesc: Date of birth, gender, height and weight are required

setup.title: Fill in your basic information
setup.description: We need this information to calculate your energy needs.

basicInfo.title: Basic information
basicInfo.lockedDesc: Date of birth, gender and height are locked once basic information is filled in. Contact support if you need to change these.
basicInfo.lockTitle: These fields are locked once basic information is filled in.
basicInfo.confirmChange:
Warning: You are trying to change "{{field}}".

These fields are locked once basic information is filled in.

Do you want to continue?

bodyComposition.title: Body composition
bodyComposition.bodyFatHint: Required for certain BMR formulas if you want to recalculate TDEE.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.deleteWarning: All your data will be permanently deleted — food items, recipes, history, profiles and measurement sets. This cannot be undone.
dangerZone.deleteConfirm: Are you absolutely sure? Type DELETE below to confirm.
dangerZone.deleteConfirmButton: Yes, I want to delete my account
dangerZone.deleteError: Something went wrong deleting your account. Please try again.

mealSettings.title: Meal settings
mealSettings.removeDisabled: You must have at least one meal
mealSettings.totalError: Total must be exactly 100%. Adjust the percentages above.
mealSettings.duplicateError: Each meal must have a unique name. Rename duplicates.
mealSettings.tip: 💡 Distribute your calories throughout the day based on your habits.
mealSettings.saveHint: Press Save changes below to update the meals in Today's log.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account and app settings
settings.manualDesc: End the day yourself with the "End day" button
settings.autoDesc: The day ends automatically at midnight
settings.toastAuto: The day will now end automatically at midnight
settings.toastManual: You will now end the day manually with the button
settings.usernameHint: Letters, numbers and _ (2–50 characters). Must be unique.
settings.emailConfirmDesc: The change activates when you click the link in the email.
settings.emailConfirmAction: Click the link in the email to activate the change.
settings.emailHint: A confirmation email will be sent to the new address.
settings.emailSameError: The new email address is the same as the current one
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
settings.usernameInvalidFormat: Invalid format. Use letters, numbers and _
settings.adminInvitationPending: An invitation has already been sent to that user
settings.deleteAccountWarning: If you delete your account, all data will be permanently lost. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure? All your data will be permanently deleted.
settings.deleteError: Something went wrong deleting your account. Please try again.

tdeeOptions.calculateDesc: Use our calculator to calculate your TDEE based on activity level and training
tdeeOptions.manualDesc: Enter your TDEE if you already know it from another source

weightTracker.title: Weight tracking
weightTracker.bodyFatNote: Does not affect your profile value.
weightTracker.noHistoryHint: Add your first weight measurement to start tracking

macroDistribution.title: Macro distribution
macroDistribution.tooLow: Recommended: Adjust the ranges so the average approaches 100%.
macroDistribution.nearHundred: Close to 100% — feel free to adjust for optimal distribution.
macroDistribution.tip: The default values follow the NNR 2023 recommendations (Fat: 25–40%, Carbohydrates: 45–60%, Protein: 10–20%). You can adjust these freely between 0–100% for each macronutrient.
